privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: TackBird Oy is responsible for processing your personal data. Contact: support@tackbird.fi. We are committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Finnish data protection law.
privacy.section2Content: We collect the following personal data to provide the service:
privacy.section2List1: Basic information: name, email address, profile picture, neighborhood
privacy.section2List2: User content: posts, messages, reviews, events
privacy.section2List3: Location data: approximate location (neighborhood level) for targeting posts
privacy.section2List4: Rental and payment data: booking history, payment metadata (Stripe processes payment details)
privacy.section2List5: Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system (analytics and security)
privacy.section3Content: We process your data on the following bases:
privacy.section3List1: Contract: providing the service to registered users (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b))
privacy.section3List2: Consent: push notifications, marketing communications, cookies (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a))
privacy.section3List3: Legitimate interest: service security, abuse prevention, analytics (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f))
privacy.section4Content: Data is stored within the EU/EEA (Supabase, Germany/Ireland). Personal data is deleted within 30 days of account deletion. Messages are anonymized. Payment data is retained for the period required by accounting law (6 years).
privacy.right1: Right of access: download all your data (Settings → Download my data)
privacy.right2: Right to rectification: edit your profile information at any time
privacy.right3: Right to erasure: delete your account and all data (Settings → Delete account)
privacy.right4: Right to portability: export your data in machine-readable JSON format (/api/auth/export)
privacy.right5: Right to object: you may object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacy.right6: Right to restriction: you may request restriction of processing
privacy.section6Content: We only use technically necessary cookies for session management and authentication. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. You can manage your cookie settings in the app settings.
privacy.section7Content: We use the following service providers for data processing:
privacy.section8Content: We protect your data with technical and organizational measures: encryption in transit (TLS), database encryption, access control, rate limiting, CSRF protection, and regular security audits.
privacy.section9Content: For privacy-related questions, contact: support@tackbird.fi. If you are not satisfied with the response, you may file a complaint with the Finnish Data Protection Ombudsman (tietosuoja.fi).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: TackBird is a neighborhood help app that connects residents of Helsinki neighborhoods. The service enables sharing help requests, offers, free items, rentals, events, and messages within the neighborhood. The service is provided by TackBird Oy.
terms.section2Content: Using the service requires registration. The user commits to:
terms.section2List1: Providing accurate and up-to-date information when registering
terms.section2List3: Using the service appropriately and respecting other users
terms.section2List4: Not sharing their account credentials with third parties
terms.section2List5: Complying with Finnish law when using the service
terms.section3Content: Offensive, violent, illegal, discriminatory, or misleading content is prohibited. Spam, chain letters, and harassment are forbidden. TackBird reserves the right to remove content, issue warnings, and suspend user accounts without prior notice.
terms.section4Content: TackBird's rental service connects item owners and borrowers. TackBird is not a party to agreements between users. The item owner is responsible for the item's condition and description. The borrower is responsible for careful use and returning the item as agreed. TackBird is not liable for damage, loss, or other harm related to borrowed items.
terms.section5Content: Payments are processed via Stripe. A 10% commission applies to the rental service (5% for Pro users). Pro subscription (€4.99/month) renews automatically. Ad campaign pricing is €2.99/day (Pro: €2.39/day). Refund policy: cancelled bookings are refunded via Stripe. For disputes, contact support@tackbird.fi.
terms.section6Content: Users' personal data is processed in accordance with the privacy policy. Users have the right to access, rectify, delete, and export their data under GDPR.
terms.section7Content: TackBird is not responsible for agreements between users, borrowed items, damages, or service interruptions. The service is provided "as is" without warranties. TackBird aims to provide the service without interruption but does not guarantee continuous availability.
terms.section8Content: Users may delete their account at any time from the app settings. TackBird reserves the right to suspend accounts if users repeatedly or seriously violate these terms. Upon account deletion, user data is removed in accordance with the privacy policy.
terms.section9Content: TackBird may modify these terms by notifying users in the app or via email. By continuing to use the service after changes, the user accepts the updated terms.
terms.section10Content: Disputes are primarily resolved through negotiation. Finnish law applies. The venue is the Helsinki District Court. For consumer disputes, users may contact the Consumer Disputes Board (kuluttajariita.fi).

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions about TackBird.
help.accountQ1: How do I create an account?
help.accountA1: You can create an account by registering with your email or Google account. After registering, fill in your profile details and choose your neighborhood.
help.accountQ2: How do I change my password?
help.accountA2: Go to Settings > Security > Change password. First enter your current password, then your new password.
help.accountQ3: How do I delete my account?
help.accountA3: Go to Settings > Delete account. Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be removed.
help.postsQ1: How do I create a post?
help.postsA1: Tap the Create tab at the bottom. Choose a category, add a title, description, and optional images. You can also set an expiration date for your post.
help.postsQ2: How do I edit or delete my post?
help.postsA2: Open your post and tap the Edit or Delete button. You can modify the title, description, and images.
help.postsA3: Your post may be awaiting moderation or may have been flagged for a content violation. Make sure your post follows the terms of service.
help.messagesQ1: How do I send a message?
help.messagesA1: Open a post you're interested in and tap the Send message button. You can also send a quick message directly from the post.
help.messagesA2: Yes, you can delete your own messages by long-pressing a message and selecting Delete. The deleted message will show a 'Message deleted' placeholder.
help.paymentsA1: TackBird Pro is a monthly subscription that gives you additional features such as boosts, ad management, and a reduced commission. The subscription renews automatically.
help.paymentsQ2: How do I cancel my Pro subscription?
help.paymentsA2: Go to Settings > TackBird Pro and select Cancel subscription. Your subscription remains active until the end of the billing period.
help.safetyQ1: How do I block a user?
help.safetyA1: Open the user's profile and tap the Block button. A blocked user cannot send you messages or see your posts.
help.safetyQ2: How do I report inappropriate content?
help.safetyA2: Tap the Report button on a post or message. Our moderators will review reports as quickly as possible.
help.safetyQ3: How do I keep my data safe?
help.safetyA3: Use a strong password, don't share your login credentials, and be careful sharing personal information in messages.
help.contactDesc: Contact our support team and we'll be happy to help.

about.title: About
about.description: TackBird is a neighborhood bulletin board that connects your local community. Find and offer help, borrow items, discover free stuff, and join local events. All in one safe and easy-to-use app.
about.creditsContent: Designed and developed in Helsinki. Thanks to all beta testers and community members who helped make TackBird better.
